notes.note: The north-western Greek region where Atticus held an estate near Buthrotum. Cicero again states his plan to move there from Thessalonica to await the outcome of the recall effort.

Cicero authorizes Atticus to write and dispatch letters under Cicero's own name as the recall campaign requires. Such delegated correspondence was a normal part of managing a patron's affairs in his absence.
The Kalends were the first day of the Roman month, with dates counted backward from them. The fifth day before the Kalends of November is 28 October.
